case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JOSEPH UNDERWOOD et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNDERWOOD, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1436 D CHINOOK COURT, TREASURE ISLAND, SAN FRANCISCO $6,492.72 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,492.72, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO ENTER UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT UNDERWOOD, JOSEPH
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT UNDERWOOD, JOSEPH

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT UNDERWOOD, JOSEPH DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT UNDERWOOD, JOSEPH
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $63.36 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
